description_long: This is a tall, ornate, wrought iron candle stand featuring two circular tiers, each holding several small, upright candles. The stand is supported by a sturdy, tripod base with decorative scrollwork and triangular braces for stability. The lower tier holds six candles, while the upper, smaller tier supports four, all arranged symmetrically. The metalwork is dark, likely black or deep bronze, with a matte finish and subtle highlights suggesting age or patina. The candles themselves are short, white, and unlit, with no visible wax drips or flames. This object exudes a classic, old-world charm, suitable for outdoor plazas, parks, or historical urban settings.
description: A tall, decorative wrought iron candle stand with two circular tiers holding multiple small white candles, supported by a scrollwork tripod base. The design is ornate and classic, ideal for urban outdoor or historical settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of candles on both tiers and the decorative scrollwork of the base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side scrollwork and the triangular support structure.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to the front, with the scrollwork and candle arrangement clearly visible.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, showing the same structural and decorative features as the front.
